name: Aya Expanse 32B
archDisplay: Dense transformer (Command-based, data arbitrage + model merging), 32B
note: SOTA-for-size open multilingual 32B model built via data arbitrage, preference tuning, and model merging across 23 languages.

results.notes: 5-shot, native chain-of-thought with strict-match scoring, averaged across 7 languages (Table 3, 32B model class) from the Aya Expanse technical report.
Open LLM Leaderboard v2, leaderboard_bbh, 3-shot, acc_norm. Not previously tracked for this model (only mmlu-pro and mgsm were present).
Open LLM Leaderboard v2, leaderboard_gpqa_diamond (0-shot), acc_norm -- matches taxonomy's gpqa=GPQA Diamond definition. New for this model.
Open LLM Leaderboard v2, leaderboard_ifeval, prompt_level_strict_acc. New for this model.

verificationNotes: Confirmed genuine via official Cohere blog (cohere.com/blog/aya-expanse-connecting-our-world, dated 2024-10-24, matches releaseDate) and SiliconANGLE coverage same date. Context length independently verified at 128K on the HF model card (not 8K as one community discussion questioned). MMLU-Pro 45.41 score directly fetched and confirmed present on the exact sourceUrl (huggingface.co/CohereLabs/aya-expanse-32b). API pricing $0.50/$1.50 confirmed via Cohere pricing docs. No changes needed.
